We find excellent erotic poetry and Srngdra in LXXIV with
superb imagery, like Sara, Vyatireka, Kavyalinga, Upamd and Arthdn-
taranyasa, Mann's testimonial for women's superiority in nine verses
is highly dignified and unique in world literature. The simile in the
last verse is very telling and full of humour—''Thieves, when caught
red-handed, cry 'thieves, thieves." Mann opines that by and large,
women have greater self-control than men. Verse 16 shows that
